Localization.Description: An attempt to revoke a role from a user

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.id} could not revoke roles "{object.account.privileges}" from user {object.account.id} in database "{object.storage.name}". Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.id} could not revoke roles "{object.account.privileges}" from user {object.account.id}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.id} revoked roles "{object.account.privileges}" from user {object.account.id} in database "{object.storage.name}"
